features.name: Spellcasting
features.safe_summary: You gain access to spell slots, a spellcasting ability, and a growing library of magical options.
features.rules_summary: You gain access to spell slots, a spellcasting ability, and a growing library of magical options.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration (d6)
features.recovery: Long Rest (Short Rest after gaining Font of Inspiration at level 5).

grants_actions.name: Bardic Inspiration (d6)
grants_actions.summary: Grant an ally a die they can spend later to swing a key roll in your party’s favor.

features.safe_summary: Grant an ally a die they can spend later to swing a key roll in your party’s favor.
features.rules_summary: Grant an ally a die they can spend later to swing a key roll in your party’s favor.

features.name: Jack of All Trades
features.safe_summary: You are broadly competent even outside your best skills.
features.rules_summary: You are broadly competent even outside your best skills.

features.name: Song of Rest (d6)
features.safe_summary: Your party gets better value from downtime healing during rests.
features.rules_summary: Your party gets better value from downtime healing during rests.

features.name: Bard College (Subclass)
features.safe_summary: Choose your college and unlock a stronger identity for the rest of the build.
features.rules_summary: Choose your college and unlock a stronger identity for the rest of the build.

features.name: Expertise
features.safe_summary: You push chosen skills into true specialty territory.
features.rules_summary: You push chosen skills into true specialty territory.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Improve key ability scores or take a feat to reshape the build.
features.rules_summary: Improve key ability scores or take a feat to reshape the build.

features.name: Cantrips Known: 3
features.safe_summary: Your known cantrip count is now 3.
features.rules_summary: Your known cantrip count is now 3.

features.name: Font of Inspiration
features.safe_summary: Your inspiration engine is now much easier to keep online.
features.rules_summary: Your inspiration engine is now much easier to keep online.
